title: AIDOS Publish Manifest
description: Configuration for publishing AIDOS artifacts to external targets

publish.description: Publish targets — each key is a target name with its own config

baseUrl.description: Confluence Cloud base URL, e.g. https://example.atlassian.net

rootPageId.description: ID of the parent page — all artifacts become child pages under this

titleTemplate.description: Template for Confluence page titles. Use %title% as placeholder for the artifact name. e.g. '(CW) %title%' → '(CW) Problem'
